files.Title: TAssetBundle.Editor.TAssetBundleManifest
files.Summary:
The main manifest file that manages AssetBundle builds.

This ScriptableObject defines:

  • Which assets belong to which AssetBundle
  • How assets are grouped (via composition strategies)
  • Build options (builtin, encryption, tags)

Create via: Right-click > Create > TAssetBundle > TAssetBundleManifest

files.Title: TAssetBundle.Extensions.AssetManager
files.Summary: AssetManager provides methods to load, unload, and manage assets and prefabs using TAssetBundle for efficient asset management. It supports asynchronous loading, unloading of unused assets, and pooling of prefabs.
